seo.title: Stitch PDF Converter & Merger - Free Online PDF Tools | Merge, Convert, Sign PDFs
seo.description: Free online PDF toolkit: merge PDFs, convert DOCX/images to PDF, compress files, add digital signatures, watermarks, QR codes, OCR in 110+ languages. 100% client-side processing - your files never leave your device.
seo.keywords: PDF merger, PDF converter, merge PDF, convert to PDF, DOCX to PDF, image to PDF, compress PDF, PDF signature, digital signature, watermark PDF, QR code generator

app.title: Stitch PDF
app.subtitle: Convert or merge PDFs, images, and documents into a single PDF - 100% client-side processing

layout.offlineMessage: You're offline - App continues to work with cached data

home.title: PDF Merger & Converter
home.scanDescription: Use your device camera to scan documents and convert to PDF
home.noFilesYet: No files added yet. Upload files to convert or merge them into a PDF.
home.advancedToolsTip: Upload a PDF file to enable advanced tools
home.batchOperationsTip: Process multiple files simultaneously with batch operations

upload.dropFilesHere: Drop files here or click to upload
upload.supportedFormats: PDF, Images (PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, BMP, SVG, HEIC, TIFF, AVIF), Documents (TXT, MD, CSV, HTML, DOCX, XLSX, XLS, ODS), ZIP

conversionSettings.title: Conversion Settings
conversionSettings.normalizeTooltip: When enabled, all pages will be resized to match the selected page size. Recommended for consistent document appearance.
conversionSettings.numberFormatHelp: Use {0} for page number (e.g., 'Page {0}' or '{0} of {1}')

ocr.title: OCR - Extract Text
ocr.noTextFound: No text found in the document

qrBarcode.title: Add QR Code or Barcode
qrBarcode.qrInfo: QR codes can store URLs, text, contact info, WiFi credentials, and more.
qrBarcode.barcodeInfo: Barcodes are ideal for product codes, inventory tracking, and shipping labels.
qrBarcode.enterContentError: Please enter content for the code
qrBarcode.failedToAdd: Failed to add code to PDF

split.title: Split or Extract PDF Pages
split.extractInfo: Creates a new PDF with only the specified pages. Original file remains unchanged.
split.splitInfo: Splits the PDF into multiple files. You'll be able to download each file separately.
split.deleteInfo: Creates a new PDF without the specified pages. Original file remains unchanged.

watermark.title: Add Watermark to PDF
watermark.watermarkTextHelp: Enter text to display as watermark
watermark.textInfo: Text watermark will be applied diagonally across all pages. Common uses: "CONFIDENTIAL", "DRAFT", "COPY".
watermark.imageInfo: Image watermark will be applied to all pages. Common uses: Company logo, stamp, seal.
watermark.failed: Failed to add watermark to PDF

pageNumbers.title: Add Page Numbers to PDF
pageNumbers.startPageHelp: The first page will be numbered with this value
pageNumbers.formatNOfTotal: Page N of Total (1 of 10, 2 of 10...)
pageNumbers.info: Page numbers will be added to all pages.
pageNumbers.failed: Failed to add page numbers to PDF

protect.title: Password Protect PDF
protect.ownerPasswordHelp: Required to modify permissions and security settings
protect.userPasswordDescription: Required to open and view the PDF
protect.ownerPasswordDescription: Required to change security settings and permissions
protect.simpleProtectionInfo: The user password will protect the PDF from being opened without the correct password.
protect.rememberPassword: Make sure to remember your password! There is no way to recover a forgotten password.
protect.weakPassword: Weak password. Consider using a longer password with mixed case, numbers, and symbols.

templates.title: Templates
templates.noTemplates: No templates yet. Create your first template!
templates.noFavorites: No favorite templates. Star a template to add it here!
templates.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this template?

recentFiles.title: Recent Files
recentFiles.noRecentFiles: No recent files found. Process some files to see them appear here!

performance.title: Performance Settings
performance.webWorkersDescription: Process PDFs in background threads for better performance
performance.notSupported: Web Workers are not supported in your browser
performance.active: Web Workers active - Processing happens in background
performance.benefit1: Faster PDF processing for large files
performance.recommendedInfo: Enable Web Workers for the best performance when merging 3+ PDF files, processing files larger than 5MB, using batch operations, or performing image-heavy conversions.
performance.enabled: Web Workers enabled - Processing will be faster!
performance.disabled: Web Workers disabled - Using standard processing

camera.title: Scan Document with Camera
camera.notAvailable: Camera not available or permission denied. Please check your browser settings and ensure you're using HTTPS.
camera.didntStartHint: Camera didn't start automatically? Try tapping the button above.
camera.positionHint: Position your document within the camera view and tap Capture
camera.failedToStart: Failed to start camera. Please ensure camera permissions are granted.

mobileSave.chooseHow: Choose how you'd like to save your PDF:
mobileSave.iosTip: iOS Tip: Tap "Share" then "Save to Files" to choose where to save your PDF
mobileSave.tip: Tip: Use "Share" to save to your Files app or share with other apps
mobileSave.featuresNotAvailable: Some features may not be available on this device.
mobileSave.couldntShare: Couldn't share the file. Try downloading instead.
mobileSave.shareCancelled: Share cancelled or not supported. Try the download option.
mobileSave.openedInSafari: PDF opened in Safari. Tap the Share icon to save to Files.
mobileSave.downloadStarted: Download started! Check your browser's downloads.
mobileSave.couldntOpenPdf: Couldn't open PDF. Please enable popups or try the Share option.
mobileSave.allowPopups: Please allow popups to view the PDF
mobileSave.downloadFailed: Download failed. Try the preview option instead.
mobileSave.couldntOpenPreview: Couldn't open preview. Check your popup blocker settings.

createBatch.title: Create Batch Operation
createBatch.batchNamePlaceholder: Enter a name for this batch

editTemplate.editInfo: Edit your template settings. Changes will be applied when you save.
editTemplate.createInfo: Create a new template to save your frequently used settings. You can apply these settings to future conversions with one click.
editTemplate.templateNameHelp: A descriptive name for your template
editTemplate.descriptionHelp: Describe when to use this template

help.title: Getting Started with Stitch PDF
help.privacyNotice: All processing happens in your browser - your files never leave your device! Works offline as a Progressive Web App (PWA).

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.step1: Upload files: Click "Add Files" or drag & drop PDFs/images/documents
quickStart.step2: Organize: Drag to reorder, click to preview, delete unwanted files
quickStart.step3: Process: Click "Merge PDFs" or choose conversion/compression options
quickStart.step4: Download: Get your processed PDF instantly

mergePdfs.title: Merge Multiple PDFs
mergePdfs.description: Add 2+ PDF files, reorder them by dragging, and click "Merge PDFs" to combine into a single document. Supports unlimited file size (client-side processing).
mergePdfs.tip: Use keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+O (add files), Ctrl+M (merge)

convert.title: Convert Documents & Images to PDF
convert.supportedFormats: Supported formats: DOCX, DOC (Microsoft Word), JPG, PNG, HEIC, TIFF, WebP (images). Multiple images can be combined into one PDF.
convert.settings: Conversion settings: Page size (A4, Letter, Legal, A3, Custom), Orientation (Portrait/Landscape), Image quality, Adjustable margins

compress.title: Compress & Optimize PDFs
compress.levels: Compression levels: Low (90% quality), Medium (70% quality), High (50% quality). Reduces file size by optimizing images and removing redundant data.

signatures.title: Add Digital Signatures
signatures.methods: Three signature methods: Draw (mouse/touch), Type (text with custom fonts), Upload (signature image file). Signatures are added as vector graphics.

ocr.title: OCR - Extract Text from PDFs (110+ Languages)
ocr.description: Extract text from scanned PDFs and images. Support for 110+ languages. Export as TXT, JSON, or CSV. Copy text directly to clipboard.
ocr.tip: Best results: Use high-quality scans with clear text.

qrBarcode.title: Generate QR Codes & Barcodes
qrBarcode.qr: QR Codes: Create for URLs, text, contact info, WiFi. Customizable size and error correction.
qrBarcode.barcode: Barcodes: Code 128, EAN-13, UPC, Code 39. Add to PDF for product labels, inventory management.

watermarks.title: Add Watermarks & Page Numbers
watermarks.watermark: Watermarks: Add text or image watermarks with adjustable opacity, position, rotation. Protect documents or add branding.
watermarks.pageNumbers: Page Numbers: Formats (1, 1/10, Page 1, Page 1 of 10), Position (Top/Bottom, Left/Center/Right), Custom starting number.

passwordProtection.title: Password Protect PDFs
passwordProtection.description: User password (required to open), Owner password (required to modify), Restrict printing/copying/editing. Uses AES encryption.

batchOperations.title: Batch Operations
batchOperations.description: Process multiple files at once: merge, convert, compress, add watermarks or page numbers. Track progress with real-time updates. Download all results as ZIP.

templates.title: Templates - Save Your Settings
templates.description: Save frequently used settings as templates. Pre-configured templates available. Mark favorites for quick access. Share by exporting as JSON.

cameraScanner.title: Camera Document Scanner
cameraScanner.description: Scan documents with your device camera. Grant camera access, take a photo, automatically converts to PDF.
cameraScanner.tip: Use good lighting and hold camera steady for best results.

help.webWorkers: Web Workers (Performance): Enable for faster processing of large files. Go to Performance Settings to toggle.
help.keyboardShortcuts: Keyboard Shortcuts: Ctrl+O (Add files), Ctrl+M (Merge), Ctrl+S (Save), Delete (Remove selected), Ctrl+D (Dark mode)
help.touchGestures: Touch Gestures (Mobile): Swipe left/right (navigate), Pinch to zoom (preview), Long press (options)
help.offlineMode: Offline Mode: Install as PWA (click install prompt) to use completely offline. All files and processing happen locally.
help.recentFilesHelp: Recent Files: Access your recent work quickly - file metadata stored locally for privacy.

privacySecurity.title: Privacy & Security
privacySecurity.clientSide: 100% Client-Side Processing: All operations happen in your browser
privacySecurity.noUploads: No File Uploads: Your files never leave your device
privacySecurity.noStorage: No Server Storage: Nothing is saved on external servers
privacySecurity.noTracking: No Tracking: Your documents and data remain completely private
privacySecurity.openSource: Open Source: Transparent code you can review
privacySecurity.worksOffline: Works Offline: No internet required after initial load

support.title: Support This Project
support.description: Stitch PDF is free and open source. If you find it useful, consider supporting development:

errors.fileRequired: Please add at least 1 file to process
errors.pdfRequired: Please add a PDF file first
errors.fileTooLarge: File too large: '{0}' ({1}) exceeds maximum of {2}
errors.outOfMemory: Out of memory while {0}. File is too large for your device. Try a smaller file or close other browser tabs.
errors.cannotRead: Cannot read '{0}': {1}. The file may be locked or corrupted.
errors.conversionError: Document conversion error: {0}. Falling back to JavaScript.
errors.refreshPage: Try refreshing the page and processing fewer files

success.mergedSuccessfully: Successfully merged {0} files into one PDF!
success.batchStarted: Batch operation started! Check 'View All' to monitor progress.

memory.criticalMessage: Consider removing some files or processing fewer files at once to prevent crashes.
memory.warningMessage: Large file processing may be slower. Memory will be managed automatically.

pwa.name: Stitch PDF
pwa.description: Free online PDF merger, converter, and editor with 100% client-side processing

coffee.supportDescription: Stitch PDF is free and open source, built with passion to provide powerful PDF tools while protecting your privacy.
coffee.feature1: 100% client-side - your files never leave your device
coffee.feature2: Works offline as a Progressive Web App
coffee.feature3: No ads, no tracking, no hidden costs
coffee.supportMessage: If you find this tool useful, consider buying me a coffee to support ongoing development! ☕
coffee.helpsFree: Your support helps keep this project free and ad-free for everyone

pdfPreview.noPreview: No preview available for this file type.

fileSettings.title: Conversion Settings for {0}
fileSettings.useCustomSettings: Use Custom Settings for This File
fileSettings.useGlobalInfo: This file will use the global conversion settings configured in the main panel.
